prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to postcode level gas consumption statistics, which are typically managed by local government bodies and energy regulators. These statistics may not specifically apply to Scotland due to its separate energy regulations and reporting framework compared to the rest of the UK. Therefore, it does not cover Scotland directly.
